title: Unilateral Non-Disclosure Agreement with Incomplete Exclusions

issues.rationale: NDA-02 has only 2 standard exclusions (public availability and prior knowledge), missing independent development and third-party receipt. This creates an asymmetric risk for the receiving party. Standard NDA suppression may cap to LOW if categorized as confidentiality risk.

ground_truth.rationale: The confidentiality definition is broad ('all information') and exclusions are incomplete. Only public availability and prior knowledge are excluded; independent development and third-party receipt are missing. This is a genuine risk for the receiving party. Severity may be LOW (if categorized as confidentiality and StandardNDA suppression fires) or MEDIUM (if categorized as Enforceability Weakness).
